case_title: RODRIGUEZ, LUIS et al vs. RAMIREZ, RAUL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, LUIS RODRIGUEZ, MARIA SERVED JUN-05-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RAUL

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-31-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY VICTOR S PALACIOS. HEARING SET FOR SEP-09-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, LUIS RODRIGUEZ, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RAUL DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-31-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-13-1998
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-09-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-09-1998, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY VICTOR S PALACIOS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-24-1998 CONTINUED FROM SEP-09-1998 TO OCT-07-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, LUIS RODRIGUEZ, MARIA

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL OR OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY VICTOR S PALACIOS. HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
